subcodes.first_line: O Mustafa! Say: Praise be unto Thee, O my Lord, the Most Glorious, inasmuch as Thou didst cause me to hear Thy call and make me present before Thy throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مصطفی قل لک الحمد یا ربی الابهی بما اسمعتنی ندائک و جعلتنی حاضرا لدی عرش
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @power of prayer, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @power of love, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
